title: rubus polyacanthos
intro: Rubus polyacanthos, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is native to the Himalayas and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its high content of antioxidants and other bioactive compounds. Rubus polyacanthos can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for many health benefits.
